_comment: Projects shown on the homepage (#projects, recent few) and the /project/ page (all, paginated). Numbering is automatic (newest/top = highest number). EXAMPLES below — replace with real projects. Fields: title, period, role, funder, description, url(optional).

projects.title: Privacy-Preserving Authentication for V2G and Intelligent Transportation Systems
projects.description: Designing lightweight, accountable, and privacy-preserving authentication and key-agreement protocols for vehicle-to-grid (V2G) and intelligent transportation systems.

projects.title: Decentralized Identifiers (DID) and Data Access Control for the Industrial IoT
projects.description: Blockchain- and DID-based decentralized authentication and fine-grained data access control for fog-enabled industrial and medical IoT environments.

projects.title: Post-Quantum and Searchable Encryption for Secure Data Sharing
projects.description: Key-aggregate searchable encryption and quantum-resistant key distribution for secure data sharing in cloud and fog environments.

projects.title: Trust Data Connectome — Autonomous Data Transaction Platform
projects.description: Monitoring and access-control mechanisms for autonomous, trustworthy personal-data transactions using decentralized identifiers and verifiable credentials.
